steps.title: Solve the quadratic
steps.content: Apply the quadratic formula to $w^2+8w-28=0$ with $a=1, b=8, c=-28$: $$w=\frac{-8\pm\sqrt{64+112}}{2}=\frac{-8\pm\sqrt{176}}{2}.$$ Since $\sqrt{176}=4\sqrt{11}$, $w=-4\pm 2\sqrt{11}$.

steps.title: Identify the matching solution
steps.content: The two solutions are $-4+2\sqrt{11}$ and $-4-2\sqrt{11}$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
